# Excellion Courses

> AI-powered course site builder for fitness influencers and coaches. Describe a course, and Excellion generates the curriculum, sales page, and student portal in minutes.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Product overview and how it works.
- [About](/about): The story and team behind Excellion.
- [Courses](/courses): Browse public courses published on Excellion.
- [Pricing](/pricing): Plans and pricing for course creators.
- [FAQ](/faq): Common questions about the builder, publishing, and payments.
- [Contact](/contact): Get in touch with the team.
- [Founding Cohort](/founding): Founding coach program (10 spots).
- [Apply](/founding/apply): Apply to the founding cohort.

## Optional

- [Privacy](/privacy)
- [Terms](/terms)
- [Legal](/legal)
